chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2920 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.12904/2022 2. For hearing of main case 12.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arshad Khan Tanoli, advocate for the respondents No.4 to 13 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 19.9.2022, which was over 03 years ago, when a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this matter fixed for hearing. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent despite the lapse of 03 years. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
